query:
SELECT ai.id, ai.account_id, a.name as account_name, ai.provider_user_name, ai.provider_user_id, ai.is_active, ai.created_at
FROM account_integrations ai
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = ai.account_id
WHERE ai.provider = 'facebook'
ORDER BY ai.created_at DESC;
